about_quotes.speaker: Alan Raph
about_quotes.evidence: Mel and Bernie and I were doing a thing for RCA Camden... I’m doing things with these guys and I’m able to kind of hold my own with them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Raph interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: I’m talking about people like Phil Bodner say, the reed player, Bernie Glow, trumpeter, Mel Davis, Doc Severinsen...
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001 [interview 2 of 2]
